title: Where can I find or get in contact with farmers specifically in the US?
abstract: I would love to gain deeper context as to farming, regulation issues and further context relating to it. If it’s possible to get in contact with a farmer or be pointed to a community if it exists, it would be really helpful.
abstract_zh: I would love to gain deeper context as to farming, regulation issues and further context relating to it. If it’s possible to get in contact with a farmer or be pointed to a community if it exists, it would be really helpful.
